headline: 59% of callers hang up when voicemail picks up.
subheadline: 68% never call back. Every missed call is a case your competitor wins.
action: Your digital law firm assistant answers every call. 24/7. Live in 2 weeks.
actionHighlight: After 14 days you'll see the numbers: how many calls you miss, how many consultations get booked, and what that means in cases.
problemHeadline: Your front desk is reachable 17 hours a week. The week has 168.
problem1: Your receptionist can only answer during office hours. But a termination notice arrives at 9 PM. A family dispute escalates on Sunday. An accident happens on a holiday. If you're not reachable, you lose the case — to the firm that picks up the phone.
problem2: You've tried call centers. They can't detect wrongful dismissal protection or the 3-week filing deadline. Hiring more staff doesn't scale and calls in sick when you need them most. Voicemail takes messages — but 59% of callers hang up before the beep.
problem2emphasis: The missed calls don't stop. Every single one is a case.
problem3: There's a way to answer every call — around the clock, with an assistant that knows your practice areas, detects urgency, and books initial consultations directly into your calendar.
agentSectionSubline: Answers every call. Identifies the practice area. Books the consultation. 24/7.
agentDesc: Answers every call professionally, identifies the practice area, assesses urgency, and books qualified initial consultations directly into your calendar. Evenings, weekends, holidays, sick days.
agentSkill2: Identify practice area (Labor Law, Family Law, Tenancy Law, Criminal Law)
agentSkill3: Assess urgency (3-week wrongful dismissal deadline, domestic violence protection)
agentSkill4: Book initial consultations directly into your calendar
agentSkill5: Send structured case information via email
agentSkill6: GDPR-compliant call handling with mandatory disclosure
agentOutcome3: No more cases lost due to unreachability
agentVoiceDesc: Clara sounds professional and calm — like an experienced law firm staff member. She introduces herself as the digital law firm assistant and mentions the recording notice before taking the inquiry.
agentToneDesc: Confident and empathetic. Takes callers seriously without giving legal advice. Detects urgency in tone and facts. Never rushed, never dismissive.
agentVoiceIntroScript: Good day, welcome to our law firm. My name is Clara, I am the digital law firm assistant. This call may be recorded and shared with our service providers. How can I help you?
legalSafety3: Never sends emails to clients or courts autonomously
practiceAreasHeadline: See what happens when a client calls.
practiceAreasSubline: Select a practice area. See the full workflow — from first ring to case file on your desk.
practiceArea1Desc: Your most common scenario: someone was fired and calls in a panic. Clara detects the 3-week filing deadline for wrongful dismissal claims, asks about the termination date and company size, and books a priority consultation.
practiceArea1Skill1: Call answered — labor law identified as practice area within seconds
practiceArea1Skill2: 3-week wrongful dismissal deadline detected and flagged as deadline warning
practiceArea1Skill3: Structured capture: termination date, employer, company size, works council
practiceArea1Skill4: Urgency assessed — deadline <72h triggers immediate prioritization
practiceArea1Skill5: Initial consultation booked directly into the right attorney's calendar
practiceArea1Skill6: Complete case file sent via email to the assigned attorney
practiceArea1Skill7: Appointment confirmation sent via SMS to the caller — no callback needed
practiceArea2Desc: Family law calls are emotional. Clara guides the conversation calmly and structurally, captures the facts, and detects whether domestic violence protection, child welfare concerns, or emergency motions are relevant.
practiceArea2Skill1: Call handled empathetically — family law identified as practice area
practiceArea2Skill2: Domestic violence screening: signals for abuse actively detected
practiceArea2Skill3: Structured capture: separation year, children, support, assets
practiceArea2Skill4: Emergency motion detection: interim orders, protection orders
practiceArea2Skill5: Consultation booked with family law specialist
practiceArea2Skill6: Complete case information sent via email to assigned attorney
practiceArea2Skill7: Domestic violence cases: immediate escalation to available attorney
practiceArea3Desc: Tenancy law runs on deadlines and documentation. Clara captures termination date, defects, rent reduction grounds, and utility cost accounting periods — all structured for your initial consultation.
practiceArea3Skill1: Call answered — tenancy law identified as practice area
practiceArea3Skill2: Deadline check: termination notice, objection period, utility cost dispute
practiceArea3Skill3: Structured capture: property, contract dates, defect description
practiceArea3Skill4: Document checklist: photos, correspondence, protocols requested
practiceArea3Skill5: Initial consultation booked into the right attorney's calendar
practiceArea3Skill6: Complete tenancy case file sent via email to assigned attorney
practiceArea3Skill7: Client receives appointment confirmation and document preparation checklist
practiceArea4Desc: Criminal law calls are emergencies. Clara detects arrest, summons, and searches, asks for critical facts, and books a consultation within minutes — even at 3 AM.
practiceArea4Skill1: Emergency call answered — criminal law identified immediately
practiceArea4Skill2: Situation identified: arrest, summons, or search
practiceArea4Skill3: Critical facts captured: rights read, attorney requested, protocol available
practiceArea4Skill4: Immediate consultation booked with criminal defense attorney — even at night
practiceArea4Skill5: Push notification sent to attorney with all captured facts
practiceArea4Skill6: Arrest situations: direct transfer to available criminal defense attorney
practiceArea4Skill7: Complete emergency case file documented and archived
practiceArea4Metric: Attorney reached in <5 minutes — even at 3 AM
practiceAreaWorkflowLabel: Workflow — from call to case file
practiceArea1Outcome1: No case lost to a missed deadline — deadlines detected in <60 seconds
practiceArea1Outcome2: Attorney starts the consultation with a complete case file on the desk
practiceArea1Outcome3: Calendar filled automatically — no callback, no media break
practiceArea1VoiceDesc: Call → practice area identified → deadline checked → urgency assessed → calendar slot booked → case file sent to attorney → confirmation sent to caller. Every step automated, every step documented.
practiceArea1ToneDesc: Deadline <72h: emergency prioritization with push notification. Consultation marked urgent. Severance negotiation: scheduled with negotiation priority.
practiceArea1VoiceIntroScript: Good day, welcome to our law firm. My name is Clara. I understand that a termination is a stressful situation. This call may be recorded. Let me take down some information so we can schedule a consultation for you as quickly as possible.
practiceArea2Outcome1: Domestic violence cases reach an available attorney in <2 minutes — no case sits idle
practiceArea2Outcome2: Emotional callers handled professionally with full case details still captured
practiceArea2Outcome3: Emergency motions detected early — attorney receives the case with deadline warning
practiceArea2VoiceDesc: Call → emotional situation stabilized → domestic violence screening → facts captured structurally → specialist calendar booked → case file to attorney → violence detected: immediate escalation. Empathy and process run in parallel.
practiceArea2ToneDesc: Domestic violence signal: immediate escalation to available attorney with all captured facts. Emergency motion detected: appointment marked urgent, deadline in email subject line.
practiceArea2VoiceIntroScript: Good day, welcome to our law firm. My name is Clara. I understand that family situations can be very stressful. This call may be recorded. I will take down your information so our attorney can get back to you as soon as possible.
practiceArea3Outcome1: Deadlines and objection rights secured from the first call — nothing gets lost
practiceArea3Outcome2: Attorney receives complete defect documentation with a document preparation checklist
practiceArea3Outcome3: Client knows immediately: appointment confirmed, documents to bring, next steps clear
practiceArea3VoiceDesc: Call → tenancy law identified → deadline check → defect captured structurally → document checklist created → attorney calendar booked → case file to attorney → client receives appointment + checklist. Precise facts, no follow-up needed.
practiceArea3ToneDesc: Utility cost deadline <30 days: objection marked urgent. Mold/health risk: immediate prioritization. Eviction notice: deadline warning to attorney with appointment urgency.
practiceArea3VoiceIntroScript: Good day, welcome to our law firm. My name is Clara. This call may be recorded. For tenancy law matters, precise documentation is especially important. Let me take down some information.
practiceArea4Outcome1: Attorney reaches the client within minutes — even at 3 AM
practiceArea4Outcome2: All critical facts documented before the attorney takes over
practiceArea4Outcome3: Arrest, search, summons — every emergency has a protocol
practiceArea4VoiceDesc: Call → criminal law identified immediately → situation assessed → critical facts captured in 90 seconds → push to attorney → arrest: direct transfer → emergency file documented. No call lost, no detail forgotten.
practiceArea4ToneDesc: Arrest: direct transfer to available criminal defense attorney — immediate, no detour. Summons: marked urgent with deadline. Search: push notification + all captured facts in the email.
practiceArea4VoiceIntroScript: Good day, welcome to our law firm. My name is Clara. This call may be recorded. I understand this may be an urgent situation. Let me quickly take down the key information so we can reach an attorney for you immediately.
claraDemoHeadline: Hear for yourself how Clara handles your calls.
claraDemoSubline: Call our demo line and experience the law firm intake live.
claraDemoExplainer: Labor law, family law, tenancy law, or criminal law — Clara identifies your practice area and guides the intake.
chatHeadline: Find out how many cases you're losing.
chatSubheadline: 5 minutes. A few questions about your firm. Then you'll know how many calls you miss — and what that means in cases.
bookDemoHeadline: Prefer to talk to a human first?
bookDemoText: Book 30 minutes with Remington. He'll look at your firm live — no slides, no AI. Just a conversation about how we can make you reachable 24/7.
kirstenDesc: Specialist Attorney for Labor & Social Law · Eberswalde
kirstenDetail: Kirsten is a specialist attorney for labor and social law. She has an assistant, but office hours cover only 17 hours per week — and crises don't follow office hours. Kirsten and her assistant jointly trained an AI assistant that seamlessly takes over when life gets in the way: evenings, weekends, sick days, lunch breaks. It classifies callers through a 4-level system they defined together, and books qualified consultations directly into the calendar. Reachability: from 17 hours to 24/7. Qualified consultations nearly doubled.
processHeadline: From demo to live in 2 weeks
processSubheadline: A proven process — the product speaks for itself.
processStep1Desc: 30 minutes with the founder. Call the law firm assistant yourself and experience the intake process live.
processStep2Desc: Your assistant answers calls and logs everything. You see exactly what you're missing.
processStep3Desc: Practice areas, lawyer calendars, appointment types and office hours — configured for your firm.
processStep4Desc: Real calls, real bookings, real CRM. The audit data makes the decision obvious.
personalNote: "I don't do slides. I pick up the phone and show you. If the product doesn't sell itself in 30 minutes, I haven't done my job."
complianceSubline: Attorney-client privilege, GDPR, no model training — built for law firms, not adapted.
compliance1Desc: Attorney-client privilege protected. No case content transmitted to AI models. PII filter before every processing step.
compliance2Desc: DPA-ready. All data processed in the EU (aws-eu-west-1). No third-country transfers.
compliance3Desc: No autonomous emails. No legal advice. No case acceptance promises. The attorney decides.
compliance4Desc: Your client data is contractually excluded from training any AI model. Period.
integrationsHeadline: Works with your law firm software.
integrationsSubline: Calendar booking, email notifications, and practice management — no media breaks.
privacySubheadline: GDPR-compliant. Hosted in the EU. No sharing with third parties.
cloudOptionDesc: All data processed and stored in the EU. Fully compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation.
localOptionDesc: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. No model is trained on your data.
enterpriseOptionDesc: You decide which data your assistant uses. Viewable, exportable, and deletable at any time.
bringYourOwnDesc: For firms with special requirements: run your assistants on your own infrastructure.
privacyTagline: Privacy is not a feature — it's the foundation.
footerTagline: AI law firm assistant for attorneys who don't want to lose another case.
demoCallModalBodyIntro: Enter the phone number you'll be calling from. Clara will know you're
demoCallModalPrivacyNote: We briefly store this routing hint so the demo call starts in the right context.
demoCallModalReadyBody: Call the demo line within the next 20 minutes using this exact number, and Clara will start directly in law firm context.
demoCallModalError: Could not prepare the demo call. Please try again.
leadCaptureSubtitle: Leave your number. Clara will call you in under 60 seconds — in law firm mode.
leadCapturePhoneHint: Include country code (e.g. +1 for US, +49 for Germany)
leadCapturePrivacy: We'll send a verification code to your phone. By submitting, you agree to a demo call and a follow-up email.
leadCaptureOtpExpired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
leadCaptureCallingBody: Pick up your phone — your law firm assistant is connecting now.
leadCaptureCallingConfirmation: Check your inbox for a confirmation email.
leadCaptureError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
leadCaptureRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
leadCapturePrivacyDirect: By submitting, you agree to a demo call and a follow-up email.
